creator: jszhao@yeah.net
text:
Install webp using the ports sytem, got the following error message:

===>  Installing for webp-0.3.1_2
===>  Checking if graphics/webp already installed
===>   Registering installation for webp-0.3.1_2
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/graphics/webp/work/stage/usr/local/bin/vwebp): No such file or directory
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 74

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/webp
make install clean
